hooks.command: source /Users/prasanta/Documents/Python_Projects/.venv/bin/activate && cd /Users/prasanta/Documents/Python_Projects && python -m pytest tests/unit/ -q > /tmp/pytest-pre-commit.txt 2>&1 || { cat /tmp/pytest-pre-commit.txt >&2; python3 -c "import json,sys; sys.stdout.write(json.dumps({'continue': False, 'stopReason': 'Unit tests failed. Fix before committing. Run: pytest tests/unit/ -q'}))"; }

source /Users/prasanta/Documents/Python_Projects/.venv/bin/activate && cd /Users/prasanta/Documents/Python_Projects && ruff check src/ -q > /tmp/ruff-push.txt 2>&1 || { cat /tmp/ruff-push.txt >&2; python3 -c "import json,sys; sys.stdout.write(json.dumps({'continue': False, 'stopReason': 'Lint (ruff) failed. Fix with: ruff check src/ --fix'}))"; }

source /Users/prasanta/Documents/Python_Projects/.venv/bin/activate && cd /Users/prasanta/Documents/Python_Projects && python -m pytest tests/unit/ -q > /tmp/pytest-push.txt 2>&1 || { cat /tmp/pytest-push.txt >&2; python3 -c "import json,sys; sys.stdout.write(json.dumps({'continue': False, 'stopReason': 'Unit tests failed. Fix before pushing. Run: pytest tests/unit/ -q'}))"; }

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '/migrations/0[0-9]+_.*[.]sql$' && python3 -c "import json,sys; sys.stdout.write(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PreToolUse', 'permissionDecision': 'ask', 'permissionDecisionReason': 'Editing an existing migration file. Never modify existing migrations - create a new numbered file (007_, 008_, ...) instead.'}}))" || true
